title: readmemh transform to VL_READMEM_N ,set depth and array_lsb

features.name: readmemh with addresses beyond 0x100000
features.description: Code should include a $readmemh call where the file contains memory addresses exceeding 0x100000 (1048576), causing out-of-bounds when Verilator transforms it to VL_READMEM_N with fixed depth

features.name: readmemh on unpacked array with depth mismatch
features.description: Code should include an unpacked memory array with $readmemh where file addresses exceed the declared array depth, triggering incorrect VL_READMEM_N parameter generation
